title: GabCraft19's Weapons API
description: The needed Mod for most of the Medieval Mods from GabCraft19
body:
#  GabCraft19's Weapons API

## Description:

GabCraft19's Weapons API is a foundational mod that adds a selection of unique items, serving as the base for other mods in the GabCraft19 series. While its primary purpose is to support and connect with other mods, it also introduces a few standalone items like the Big Stick, a versatile weapon perfect for early combat.

## Features:

- Essential Base Items: Adds core items like the Big Stick, designed to work both as weapons and foundational items for GabCraft19’s other mods.

- Support for Other Mods: Ensures smooth integration and resource-sharing, providing a cohesive experience when used alongside other GabCraft19 mods.

Whether used alone for basic gameplay enhancements or as a supporting mod, GabCraft19's Weapons API lays the groundwork for more advanced mod from GabCraft19's series.

If you want you can develop a extation for this mod.

[Get a 5% discount on my Ko-fi page. Code: MODRINTH](https://ko-fi.com/gabcraft19/link/MODRINTH)
